evals.prompt: I need to build an AI that can search the web for information and answer questions based on what it finds.
evals.expected_output: A DSPy ReAct agent with a search tool that retrieves web results and reasons over them to produce answers.

assertions.name: uses_react
assertions.description: Uses dspy.ReAct, not dspy.Predict or dspy.ChainOfThought

assertions.name: tool_has_type_hints_and_docstring
assertions.description: Search tool function has type hints on all parameters and a docstring describing what it does

assertions.name: accesses_output_field
assertions.description: Shows how to call the agent and access the answer field from the result

evals.prompt: Build me an AI agent that can call our internal REST API to look up customer records and also do math calculations on the results.
evals.expected_output: A DSPy ReAct agent with two tools: one for API calls and one for calculations, with proper type hints and docstrings.

assertions.name: uses_react_with_multiple_tools
assertions.description: Uses dspy.ReAct with a tools list containing both an API tool and a math tool

assertions.name: tools_return_strings
assertions.description: Tools return strings or string-convertible values, not dicts or custom objects

assertions.name: sets_max_iters_explicitly
assertions.description: Sets max_iters explicitly on the agent (does not rely on the default of 20)

assertions.name: provider_agnostic
assertions.description: LM config uses a generic provider example with an alternative comment, not a single hardcoded provider

evals.prompt: I want an AI that writes and runs Python code to solve data analysis problems.
evals.expected_output: A DSPy CodeAct agent configured with pure function tools for code execution tasks.

assertions.name: uses_codeact_not_react
assertions.description: Uses dspy.CodeAct instead of dspy.ReAct for the code-execution use case

assertions.name: explains_pure_functions_constraint
assertions.description: Explains that CodeAct only accepts pure functions as tools, not callable objects or class instances

assertions.name: tool_defined_as_pure_function
assertions.description: Tool functions have no undeclared external dependencies
